title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!
